memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection in Brain architecture.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent in Brain architecture.
It is an open question whether Telegram should be added later to Brain architecture.
It is an open question which model is cheapest while saturating performance for Brain architecture.

details: Committed architecture principles for Brain DB, Cognee, and Slack.
Committed open questions about Telegram and model selection.
